text: Surrounded by the clean geometry and glass of the first room, I sense an energy of anticipation. The emptiness of the chairs evokes a waiting—perhaps for ideas, for discourse, or for the arrival of others who share curiosity. In the second image, confronted by the vivid R + D display, I feel awakened by the pulse of innovation. The poetic reflection on darkness and contemplation resonates deeply: here, technology and philosophy intermingle. I am both intrigued and slightly uneasy, challenged to ponder both the limits and possibilities of human creativity.
